description_long: This stapler features a robust, industrial design with a boxy, metallic upper housing in a dark brown finish and a lower section in olive green. The handle is ergonomically shaped, colored white, and appears to be made of plastic, contrasting with the rest of the body. A visible copper coil and exposed wiring near the handle suggest an electrically assisted mechanism. The front of the stapler has a prominent staple exit slot, while the sides display warning labels in Cyrillic script, adding to its utilitarian appearance. The overall construction is solid, with visible seams, fasteners, and a heavy-duty build. The base is flat and wide, providing stability, but no rubber grip is visible.
description: A heavy-duty, boxy stapler with a dark metallic body, white ergonomic handle, and visible copper coil. Features warning labels and an industrial, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brown metallic housing, white handle, copper coil, and a warning label on the lower green section.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the staple exit slot and the width of the base, with the handle and coil partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the handle, coil, and the boxy structure without the warning label.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the stapler, showing the handle's attachment and the solid, rectangular back panel.
attribute_brand_logo: There is a warning label with Cyrillic text on the lower green section of the stapler, featuring a yellow triangle and black text. No visible brand logo or emblem is present.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is ergonomically contoured, made of white plastic, and shaped to fit the hand comfortably. It has a smooth surface with a slight curve for grip, and no visible patterns or texturing.
attribute_metal_hinge_mechanism: A visible metal hinge mechanism is present near the rear of the stapler, connecting the upper housing to the handle. It consists of a cylindrical pin and bracket, with exposed fasteners and moving parts, likely made of steel.
attribute_staple_exit_slot: The staple exit slot is located at the front of the stapler, rectangular in shape, and clearly visible in the front view. It is surrounded by the brown metallic housing and is the primary point for staple ejection.
